statement: The grammar pattern '不妨 (bùfáng)' means 'Used to suggest or propose a course of action'

correctAnswer: Used to suggest or propose a course of action

statement: The grammar pattern '既然...就... (jìrán... jiù...)' means 'The construction '既然...就...' expresses that Since'
